name: Broiled/Grilled Caribou Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the basting sauce ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place the Caribou steaks in the bowl to soak, ensuring they are fully coated with the sauce for at least 24 hours.
3. Remove the steaks from the sauce and discard the remaining liquid.
4. Pat the steaks dry on a clean surface or board.
5. Make small incisions along the edges of each steak.
6. Rub the bacon fat or lard evenly over the entire surface of the steaks.
7. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
8. Place the steaks on the hot grill and cook until they reach medium-rare doneness.
9. Baste the steaks with the reserved basting sauce while cooking, turning them once halfway through for even coating.
10. Using tongs or a spatula, transfer the steaks to a warmed serving platter.
11. Serve immediately with the remaining basting sauce placed in a separate sauceboat on the side.
